title: WikiPage
description: A wiki page with its content and metadata

id.description: Numeric ID of the page in the wiki repository

order.description: Display order of the page among siblings

isNonConformant.description: Whether the page violates wiki naming conventions

isParentPage.description: Whether this page has child pages

gitItemPath.description: Path of the corresponding file in the Git repository

url.description: URL to access this page via the REST API

remoteUrl.description: URL to view the page in a web browser

subPages.description: Child pages of this page (if recursion was requested)
